suggestionIssueLink: Got a suggestion or an issue?
numberDetailsNamesDataFrom: Phone numbers, point of interest details and region names from {source}
fixableNumbersDescription: These numbers appear to be valid numbers but are formatted incorrectly. The suggested fix assumes that they are indeed numbers for this country. Not all 'auto' fixes are necessarily valid, so please do not blindly click on all the fix links without first verifying the number.
noAutoFixable: No automatically fixable phone numbers found in this state.
invalidNumbersDescription: These numbers are all invalid in some way; maybe they are too long or too short, or perhaps they're missing an area code. The website could be used to check for a valid number, or a survey may be necessary.
noInvalidNumbers: No invalid phone numbers found in this state.
foreignNumbersDescription: These numbers are all valid, but belong to a different country. They are not necessarily errors, however in some cases an incorrect country code may have been used.
reportSubtitle: A report on invalid phone numbers in OpenStreetMap data for various countries.
invalidNumbersOutOf: {invalid} invalid numbers ({fixable} potentially fixable) out of {total}
reportSubtitleForCountry: A report on invalid phone numbers in OpenStreetMap data for {country}.
name: Name
noDivisionsFound: No states with invalid numbers found.
restoreUnsavedEdits: You have unsaved edits, do you want to restore them?
enterComment: Please enter a comment before submitting.
noChangesSubmitted: No changes submitted, maybe someone else has already made the same edits.
notLoggedIn: You need to be logged in to submit edits or open notes
hasInvalidSingular: {name} has an invalid phone number, what should it be?
hasInvalidPlural: {name} has invalid phone numbers, what should they be?
reportSubtitleNames: A report on incomplete names in OpenStreetMap data for various countries.
reportSubtitleNamesForCountry: A report on incomplete names in OpenStreetMap data for {country}.
missingNamesDescription: All of these have a language-specific name, but do not have a main name specified. Probably one of the language-specific names should be used as the primary name, in which case the buttons can be used to add that as the name.
incompleteNamesDescription: All of these have language-specific names, but none of them match the primary name. This may be because the specific language tag is missing, in which case the buttons can be used to copy the name to the correct language tag.
noIncompleteNames: No incomplete names found in this state.
hasIncompleteName: {name} has an incomplete multi-lingual name. The name tag should match one of the language specific names, but it doesn't.
hasMissingName: {name} is missing a primary name tag, despite having a language specific name set. What is the correct name?
reportSubtitleHours: A report on invalid opening hours in OpenStreetMap data for various countries.
reportSubtitleHoursForCountry: A report on invalid opening hours in OpenStreetMap data for {country}.
fixableHoursDescription: These opening hours are essentially valid but are not in the standard format in some way. The suggested fix is how the hours are interpretted by a standard processor. Not all 'auto' fixes are necessarily valid, so please do not blindly click on all the fix links without first verifying the change.
invalidHoursDescription: These opening hours are all invalid and cannot be understood. The website could be used to check for the correct hours, or a survey may be necessary.
hasInvalidHours: {name} has invalid opening hours, what should they be?
invalidHoursOutOf: {invalid} invalid opening hours ({fixable} potentially fixable) out of {total}
checkOpeningHoursFormat: You may find this {link} useful to check the opening hours format.
noInvalidHours: No invalid opening hours found in this state.
